name: Lantz - Puerto de Artesiaga – variante circular Nafarroa Xtreme (BTT Eremua)
region_intro: Mountain bike trails around Lantz are characterized by significant elevation changes and challenging terrain, making it a destination for experienced riders. The region features dense forests and mountain passes, offering demanding ascents and technical descents. Riders can expect routes that navigate through varied landscapes, from wooded areas to open mountain views. This area provides a robust environment for mountain biking, with a focus on more advanced trails. Best mountain bike trails around Lantz The most popular mountain bike trail is Lantz - Puerto de Artesiaga – variante circular Nafarroa Xtreme (BTT Eremua), a 26.8 miles (43.2 km) trail that takes 5 hours 15 minutes to complete. This route features substantial climbing through mountainous terrain. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Goitiko Gaina y Leateko Gaina – circular por las trialeras del bosque Burdindogi, a difficult 19.6 miles (31.5 km) path. It explores forest singletracks and offers panoramic views from mountain peaks. Local mountain bikers also love the Leateko Gaina Rock Viewpoint loop from Eugiko urtegia, a 6.0 miles (9.6 km) trail leading through forested areas to a prominent rock viewpoint, often completed in about 1 hour 25 minutes. Mountain biking around Lantz is defined by challenging mountain passes, dense woodlands, and significant elevation gains. The network offers options for various ability levels, though a majority of routes are suited for advanced riders. The routes in Lantz are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 3.7 stars from over 15 reviews. More than 600 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Lantz's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Lantz?
A: There are over 20 mountain bike trails around Lantz documented on komoot. The region is known for its challenging terrain and significant elevation changes, offering a robust environment for mountain biking.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Lantz?
A: The mountain bike trails in Lantz are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 3.7 stars from over 15 reviews. Riders often praise the demanding ascents, technical descents, and the varied landscapes, from dense forests to open mountain views.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails in Lantz for beginners?
A: While Lantz is primarily known for its challenging routes, there is 1 easy mountain bike trail available. The majority of routes are suited for advanced riders due to significant elevation changes and technical sections.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails around Lantz?
A: You can expect trails characterized by significant elevation changes, dense forests, and mountain passes. The terrain includes demanding ascents and technical descents, navigating through varied landscapes from wooded areas to open mountain views. Many routes feature forest singletracks.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for advanced riders in Lantz?
A: Yes, Lantz is an excellent destination for advanced riders. Out of the 24 available routes, 19 are rated as difficult. These trails feature substantial climbing through mountainous terrain and technical singletracks.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Lantz?
A: Yes, many routes in Lantz are circular. For example, the popular &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e989941375/lantz-puerto-de-artesiaga-variante-circular-nafarroa-xtreme-btt-eremua" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lantz - Puerto de Artesiaga – variante circular Nafarroa Xtreme (BTT Eremua)&lt;/a&gt; is a challenging loop. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e988206769/goitiko-gaina-y-leateko-gaina-circular-por-las-trialeras-del-bosque-burdindogi" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Goitiko Gaina y Leateko Gaina – circular por las trialeras del bosque Burdindogi&lt;/a&gt;, which explores forest singletracks.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Lantz?
A: Given the region's mountainous terrain and dense forests, spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant conditions for mountain biking in Lantz, with milder temperatures and vibrant scenery. Summers can be warm, and winters may bring challenging conditions, especially at higher elevations.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails in Lantz with scenic viewpoints?
A: Absolutely. Many trails offer panoramic views. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38209114" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Leateko Gaina Rock Viewpoint loop from Eugiko urtegia&lt;/a&gt; leads to a prominent rock viewpoint. You can also find excellent views from mountain peaks along routes like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e988206769/goitiko-gaina-y-leateko-gaina-circular-por-las-trialeras-del-bosque-burdindogi" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Goitiko Gaina y Leateko Gaina – circular por las trialeras del bosque Burdindogi&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What are some longer mountain bike routes in Lantz?
A: For longer rides, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e989941375/lantz-puerto-de-artesiaga-variante-circular-nafarroa-xtreme-btt-eremua" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lantz - Puerto de Artesiaga – variante circular Nafarroa Xtreme (BTT Eremua)&lt;/a&gt;, which spans 26.8 miles (43.2 km) and takes approximately 5 hours 15 minutes. Another substantial option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15009046" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Leateko Gaina Rock Viewpoint – Trail to Goitiko Gaina loop from Lantz&lt;/a&gt;, covering 24.8 miles (39.9 km).

Q: What are some notable attractions or landmarks I can see while mountain biking in Lantz?
A: While mountain biking in Lantz, you can encounter several interesting landmarks. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/985119" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Artesiaga Pass&lt;/a&gt; is a significant feature, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1064398" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Orgi Forest&lt;/a&gt; offers a beautiful natural setting. You might also pass by the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5411725" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santiago Hermitage&lt;/a&gt; or enjoy the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5303798" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Views of the Eugi reservoir&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails in Lantz that pass by cafes or places to eat?
A: While specific cafes directly on trails are not detailed, many routes start or pass near Lantz itself, where you can find local establishments. It's advisable to carry sufficient supplies, especially on longer or more remote trails, as the region features dense woodlands and mountain passes.

Q: Can I find mountain bike trails with public transport access in Lantz?
A: Information on specific public transport access points for mountain bike trails in Lantz is not readily available. It is generally recommended to plan your transport to trailheads in advance, as many routes venture into more remote, mountainous areas.
tips: This route is the first to be opened in search of the old paths that connected the charcoal kilns that were distributed throughout the Burdindogi forest. The route begins just before the Leateko Gaina viewpoint and ends at the parking lot at the tail of the reservoir. Affordable route, a lot of flow and very enjoyable. The hardest steps are right at the beginning, a small trial section of 15 meters gives way to a route of authentic enjoyment. A CLASSIC.
Highway port at 984 masl, very popular in the area since you can get here both by road and by paths, either by mtb or on foot. A very quiet place with very beautiful panoramic views.
